rationale: Iran deal credibility story continues as Tehran contradicts Trump; China arrests US researcher raising bilateral tensions; no domestic economic shock or military deployment this cycle.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Tehran's public contradiction of Trump's deal claims is a domestic credibility and foreign policy story for US residents. No oil price spike yet but deal uncertainty keeps Middle East risk elevated.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher suspected of spying
top_events.summary: A US researcher detained by China on espionage charges raises US-China tensions directly affecting Americans abroad and bilateral trade/diplomatic relations. A new and notable development.

top_events.title: Indian sailor killed in US strike on oil tanker in Hormuz
top_events.summary: US military strikes in the Hormuz region continue to have real consequences; civilian casualties from US action could generate domestic political and legal scrutiny. Indirect but notable.
